P0.task: Implement the database schema for Saved Resources
P0.description: Create the `SavedResource` model in `apps/api/src/presets/model.py` (or a dedicated `saved_resources/model.py` if preferred but since it FKs to presets maybe separate file). Generate Alembic migrations. The table involves JSONB columns for `resource_data` and `evaluation_data`.
Update `apps/api/src/discovery/schemas.py` to add `custom` to the `source` literal and create `CustomMetadata`. Update Pydantic response models for SavedResource.

P1.description: Implement `POST /api/saved`, `DELETE /api/saved/{id}`, `GET /api/saved`, `POST /api/saved/link`, and `POST /api/saved/evaluate`. Handle idempotent inserts, custom link fetching/scraping, and routing it to the _run_rag_pipeline. Create `apps/api/src/saved_resources/router.py` and `service.py`. Register the router in `main.py`.

P2.task: Generate API client & Implement Frontend features
P2.description: Run `bun run gen:api` in `apps/web`. Implement the Bookmark toggle on `ResourceCard`. Add the Sidebar drawer to the search page. Create the new `/library` page with 'Add Link' functionality and evaluation batch jobs.
